title: Plug Power Secures 2GW Electrolyser Deal for Uzbekistan Green Hydrogen Project
content: Plug Power Inc. has just landed a monumental deal with Allied Green Ammonia (AGA), locking in a whopping 2 gigawatts of electrolyzer capacity for a game-changing $5.5 billion green fuels facility in Uzbekistan. The facility will use green hydrogen to produce sustainable aviation fuel (SAF), ammonia for fertilizer, and green diesel.
author: Analysts Account
